caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing 20 kt winds with 4.3 ft wave heights and a 69% rain probability, while San Juan has 17 kt winds, making these ports the most impacted in the Eastern Caribbean today. I expect the less than 10% rain probability in other areas to contribute to mostly dry conditions, allowing for smoother sailing in those regions.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 22 kt winds and 7.6 ft wave heights with a 98% rain probability, while nearby Lisbon has 17 kt winds. The Western Mediterranean will see significant impacts from this system, with Cadiz being the top impact port due to the high wind and wave conditions.
